summary: Made two surgical seam edits: tightened the opening handoff from chapter 11 by anchoring Jet's departure to Ed's exit, and added a closing airlock cue to better set up the staggered overnight returns described in chapter 13.
edits: Rewrote Jet's first sentence to pick up directly after Ed leaves the common room.
Added an airlock-cycle reference to Ed's final beat to tee up the next chapter's overnight return pattern.
